pool.baseline: it's just so quiet. i keep walking into the kitchen thinking i heard him, but its just the silence. the house feels like a tomb and honestly i dont even know why i bother getting out of bed anymore. what's the point of even existing when the only person who made it all make sense is just... gone. i feel like a ghost.

pool.baseline: i was just looking at some photos of the deep field nebulae and it just hit me... like nothing we do actually matters. in a few billion years the sun just goes out and everything we've ever built or felt or suffered just... vanishes. it feels stupid to even try to keep going when the math says it's all just a temporary glitch in a cold universe.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the market crash wiped out the last of the VC funding and i've got nothing left. the debt is just... it's everywhere. i can't even think about going back to my family like this. they think i'm this big success and if they see me now, i just can't face that shame. i feel like there is no version of the future where i don't feel this level of disgrace.
